eat anything, never gain weight::never sleep again, always feel fully rested
talk to animals, but they only complain::understand all languages, but can only whisper
every other food tastes like your favorite food::your favorite food tastes like dirt
only speak in rhymes for the rest of your life::only walk backward for the rest of your life
know what someone is thinking, but only if it's about squirrels::know where any lost item is, but can never get it back
every drink you have tastes like water::every food you eat tastes like chicken
